race.name: L'Etape Slovakia by Tour de France
race.display_name: L'Étape Slovakia by Tour de France
race.tagline: Official Tour de France amateur cycling event in Slovakia

vitals.entry_fee: Early-bird pricing available; exact cost not specified

terrain.overview: Urban roads through Bratislava center, peripheral historical areas, picturesque villages in Malé Karpaty foothills, Pezinok vineyards, Carpathian Forest Park peaks

logistics.explanation: Professional organization with high-level security, timing, and L'Etape Series infrastructure

length.explanation: 112km long route offers solid challenge; 60km option more accessible

technicality.explanation: Mixed terrain with urban, village, and mountain sections requires versatile handling

elevation.explanation: 1700m gain on long route provides significant climbing challenge

climate.explanation: Late August in Slovakia typically favorable; specific data unavailable

altitude.explanation: Lowland/mountain foothills; no high altitude challenges

adventure.explanation: Touristic route through vineyards, historical sites, and Carpathian forests

prestige.explanation: Official Tour de France L'Etape Series franchise event

race_quality.explanation: Professional timing, hill/sprint awards, Velits brothers as ambassadors

experience.explanation: L'Etape Village festival, Tour de France museum, French culture immersion

community.explanation: Race week with social rides, kids races, family events, workshops

field_depth.explanation: Amateur focus; field size unspecified but Tour de France branding attracts quality

value.explanation: Premium experience at early-bird pricing; full race week program

expenses.explanation: Major European city location; costs reasonable for event quality

cultural_impact.explanation: Brings Tour de France prestige to Slovakia with local heroes Peter & Martin Velits

biased_opinion.overview: L'Etape Slovakia delivers authentic Tour de France atmosphere in stunning Carpathian setting. The 112km/1700m Race route through Bratislava's vineyards and forests offers genuine gran fondo challenge with professional polish. Velits brothers' involvement adds local prestige. Must-do for Central European cyclists seeking L'Etape Series qualifier experience.

logistics.overview: Start: Štrkovec Lake. Finish: Kamzík. Professional organization with high-level security, timing systems, expo village. Registration open. Family Day August 22 with kids races and shorter rides.

history.overview: 6th edition in 2026 (started ~2021). Part of global L'Etape Series (founded 1993, 21 countries). Slovak ambassadors: Peter Velits (6x Tour de France) and Martin Velits (1x Tour de France).

course_description.character: Urban start through Bratislava center, historical peripheral areas, Malé Karpaty foothill villages, **Suffering Zone: Pezinok vineyard climbs**, Carpathian Forest Park peaks to iconic Kamzík finish. **Suffering Zones:** Vineyard rollers (technical descents), final Carpathian peak grind to Kamzík.

non_negotiables: Official Tour de France L'Etape Series event
